arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ revealing stance on amount of transfer activity expected before close of window
arts.sum: John Mousinho is refusing to put a ceiling on the amount of transfer business Pompey will conduct this month.

arts.sum: Pompey play Wycombe Wanderers in the FA Cup on Friday.

arts.ttl: Full up: The position Portsmouth boss no longer wants to strengthen in transfer window
arts.sum: John Mousinho has ruled out signing another central defender in the January window.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss explains striker's departure after Fratton Park exit confirmed
arts.sum: John Mousinho has admitted it just simply didn’t work out for Elias Sorensen at Pompey.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth transfer development over forgotten duo with former Coventry City man and Fratton favourite set to depart
arts.sum: John Mousinho has revealed there’s interest in Pompey’s deregistered duo as they aim to end their Fratton purgatory.

arts.ttl: 'Irreplaceable, Not Championship standard, Surprise hit, Struggled physically': Neil Allen's Portsmouth mid-season player ratings
arts.sum: The Championship campaign has paused for a weekend as attention turns to the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Struggling ex-Newcastle striker departs Portsmouth after just five months at Fratton Park
arts.sum: Elias Sorensen has left Pompey - after just five months at Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: How Portsmouth can offer career lifeline to forgotten Newcastle United man and ex-Premier League regular shackled by six-year contract
arts.sum: In an attempt to retain their top young talent, Newcastle United unveiled Isaac Hayden and Karl Darlow on long-term deals in September 2020.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth stance on Preston North End midfielder revealed amid reports of January transfer window interest
arts.sum: Pompey have made no approaches to bring Preston North End midfielder Ryan Ledson to Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth facing competition in race for out-of-contract Championship midfielder
arts.sum: Portsmouth are among the clubs interested in signing Preston North End’s Ryan Ledson, according to Mike Keegan. Portsmouth… The post Portsmouth facing competition in race for out-of-contract Championship midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
